system.name: Lymphatic & Immune System
system.shortDescription: Lymphatic drainage network + immune defense. Lymph nodes, vessels, spleen, thymus, tonsils, MALT/GALT. Innate + adaptive immunity. The body's surveillance and clearance system.

primaryStructures: Lymph nodes (~600 throughout body — clusters: cervical, axillary, inguinal, mesenteric)
Bone marrow (B-cell maturation, all blood cells)
White blood cells: neutrophils, lymphocytes (T, B, NK), monocytes/macrophages, eosinophils, basophils

lymph_flow: Capillaries → collecting vessels → trunks → ducts (right lymphatic + thoracic) → venous return

anatomy.vertebralCorrelates: Thymus: T2-T4. Spleen: T6-T9 (left side). Major lymph clusters supplied by adjacent spinal nerves.
anatomy.nervePlexus: Sympathetic innervation of spleen, thymus, lymph nodes. Vagal influence on GALT and immune-gut signaling.

astrologicalRulership.primaryPlanetRationale: Neptune rules dissolution boundary (immune self/non-self discrimination); Moon rules fluid (lymph). Cornell (1933): 'Lymphatic system — under fluid signs (Water) and Jupiter/Moon dominion.'

secondaryPlanets.rules: Immune self/non-self boundary, autoimmune patterns, idiopathic immune
secondaryPlanets.rationale: Modern: Neptune dissolves boundaries — exactly the immune problem when malfunctioning

secondaryPlanets.rules: Lymphatic fluid, lymph flow, mother's antibody transfer

secondaryPlanets.rationale: Cornell: 'Jupiter rules the blood and its constituents.'

secondaryPlanets.rules: Thymus gland, vital immune force, heart-immune axis
secondaryPlanets.rationale: Sun rules Leo (heart area where thymus sits)

secondaryPlanets.rules: Acute inflammatory immune response, infection-fighting, fever
Chronic suppressed immunity, immunodeficiency, autoimmune chronic
secondaryPlanets.rationale: Cornell: 'Saturn restricts vital functions including immune.'

secondaryPlanets.rules: Deep immune transformation, cancer immunology, profound immune reset

axes.name: Digestive-Immune Axis
axes.interpretation: THE primary immune axis. ~70% of immune tissue lives in gut (GALT). Virgo: discriminating gut-immune surveillance. Pisces: immune boundary dissolution. Most autoimmune and allergic conditions track this axis.

axes.name: Renal Axis (immune-allergic overlay)
axes.interpretation: Adrenal cortisol (Aries-Mars) suppresses inflammation. Kidney filtration (Libra) clears immune complexes. Chronic stress = HPA dysregulation = immune dysfunction.

energetics.chakra: Heart (Anahata) — thymus / Third Eye (Ajna) — pineal-immune / Sacral (Svadhisthana) — GALT
energetics.nervousSystemPathway: Vagus → spleen → immune anti-inflammatory reflex (cholinergic anti-inflammatory pathway). Sympathetic adrenal → immune modulation.
energetics.brainwaveAffinity: Alpha-Theta — parasympathetic state supports immune function
energetics.meridianCrossover_TCM: Lung meridian (defensive Qi / Wei Qi — immune in TCM). Large Intestine. Spleen (immune-digestive).

cellSalts.indicatedFor: Acute infection onset, fever first 24-48hr, inflammatory immune response.
Swollen lymph glands, white catarrh, lymphatic stagnation.
Chronic immune burden, slow-clearing infections, persistent lymphadenopathy.

supplementaryHerbs.name: Echinacea
supplementaryHerbs.mechanism: Innate immune stimulant; macrophage + NK cell activation
supplementaryHerbs.indicatedFor: Acute viral/bacterial — early infection onset; short course only

supplementaryHerbs.name: Astragalus
supplementaryHerbs.indicatedFor: Chronic low immunity, post-illness rebuild. AVOID during acute illness.

supplementaryHerbs.name: Reishi (Ganoderma)
supplementaryHerbs.indicatedFor: Chronic immune dysregulation, autoimmune balance, cancer immune support (adjunctive only)

modalityRecommendations.individual: Daily immune support: sleep (THE most powerful immune intervention), movement (lymph has no pump — muscles move it), nutrition (zinc, D, C, glutamine), stress management, gut health. Acute illness: rest, hydrate, elderberry/echinacea early, monitor for warning signs.
modalityRecommendations.medical_astrologer: Neptune + Pisces primary. Moon for lymph fluid. Thymus = Sun-Leo. Virgo-Pisces axis for chronic immune. Mars for acute inflammatory response. Outer planet transits to natal Neptune significant for autoimmune timing.
modalityRecommendations.reiki: Thymus chakra extended (sternum). Crown for immune subtle. Distance reiki especially appropriate during acute illness.
modalityRecommendations.bodywork_general: Manual Lymphatic Drainage (MLD — Vodder method) is THE specialty technique. Gentle, rhythmic, light pressure following lymph pathways. Dry brushing. Compression. Inversions (legs up wall).
modalityRecommendations.bodywork_contraindications: Active acute infection with fever: avoid (can spread). Active cancer with metastasis: SPECIAL CERTIFICATION required (oncology massage). DVT: never. Cardiac/renal failure: caution with fluid mobilization.
modalityRecommendations.naturopathy: Acute: elderberry, echinacea (short course), zinc, vitamin C, vitamin D, rest. Chronic immune support: astragalus, reishi (medicinal mushrooms), adaptogens, gut healing. Autoimmune: AIP framework, gut-immune axis, stress.
modalityRecommendations.acupuncture: Lung meridian (Wei Qi defensive energy). LU 7 Lieque. ST 36 Zusanli (immune boost). LI 4 Hegu.
modalityRecommendations.ayurveda_phase2_placeholder: Ojas (immune essence). Rasayanas (chyawanprash). Amalaki. Tulsi. Guduchi. Phase 2.
modalityRecommendations.pastoral_spiritual: Self as boundaried being. Discernment as immune intelligence. Prayer for protection and clearing.

pathologies.name: Autoimmune Conditions (general)
pathologies.classicalReference: Modern attribution — Neptune rules immune boundary confusion. Cornell pre-dates autoimmune concept formally but described similar patterns as 'self-poisoning,' 'altered blood diathesis.'

indicatorLanguage.individual: Autoimmune conditions are increasingly common and have a strong lifestyle/environmental component. Functional medicine, AIP diet trial, gut healing, stress management, sleep, and stress reduction often produce significant improvement alongside medical management. Work with rheumatology or relevant specialty for diagnosis and core treatment.
indicatorLanguage.practitioner: Neptune-Mars and Virgo-Pisces axis configurations classically align with autoimmune patterns (modern attribution). Functional medicine framework: address gut, stress, sleep, food sensitivities, environmental toxins. NEVER replace specialty medical care for autoimmune.

modalityNotes.lifestyle: AIP/anti-inflammatory diet, gut healing, sleep, stress, vitamin D, omega-3

redFlags: Flare with neurological symptoms, vision changes → urgent

pathologies.name: Allergic Disorders (general)

indicatorLanguage.individual: Allergies range from minor (seasonal sneezing) to life-threatening (anaphylaxis). Identify triggers, avoid when possible, support with antihistamines + nervines. Severe reactions require epinephrine and emergency care.
indicatorLanguage.practitioner: Mercury-Uranus configurations align with hypersensitivity. Quercetin, nettle, vitamin C supportive. Refer to allergist for testing, immunotherapy options.

modalityNotes.lifestyle: Trigger avoidance, gut healing, quercetin, nettle, local honey trial

redFlags: Anaphylaxis (throat swelling, BP drop, wheezing) → 911 + epinephrine

pathologies.name: Chronic Fatigue Syndrome / ME-CFS

indicatorLanguage.individual: Post-viral chronic fatigue (including long COVID) is real and increasingly recognized. Pacing (do less than you think you can), avoiding post-exertional malaise, mitochondrial support, addressing co-infections, sleep optimization — gradual recovery is possible for many.
indicatorLanguage.practitioner: Neptune-Sun configurations align with vitality-dissolution patterns. ME-CFS criteria specific (post-exertional malaise central). Pacing primary intervention. Mitochondrial cofactors (CoQ10, ribose, magnesium). Reactivated viral testing (EBV, HHV-6). Refer to ME-CFS-knowledgeable physicians.

modalityNotes.bodywork: VERY gentle — clients have post-exertional malaise. Short sessions.
modalityNotes.lifestyle: Pacing, energy envelope, sleep, gentle movement (within tolerance), nutritional support

redFlags: New cardiac symptoms (POTS often comorbid) → cardiology

pathologies.name: Lymphedema
pathologies.classicalReference: Cornell (1933): 'Lymphatic obstruction — Saturn afflicting fluid signs.'

indicatorLanguage.individual: Lymphedema (chronic limb swelling, often post-surgery or post-radiation) requires specialized care — Complete Decongestive Therapy (CDT) is gold standard. Find a Certified Lymphedema Therapist (CLT). Compression garments. Daily care.
indicatorLanguage.practitioner: MLD specialty certification required for therapeutic lymphedema work. Standard massage contraindicated (worsens). Refer to Certified Lymphedema Therapist.

modalityNotes.bodywork: Manual Lymphatic Drainage (Vodder) specialty cert required. Standard massage CONTRAINDICATED.
modalityNotes.lifestyle: Compression garments, skin care (cellulitis risk), elevation, exercise within compression

redFlags: Sudden warm red swelling → cellulitis, urgent MD

complianceNotes.scopeOfPractice: Acute serious infection, suspected cancer, autoimmune disease all require medical care. Holistic adjunctive.
criticalReferralRules: Lymph nodes hard, fixed, > 1cm persistent → urgent oncology workup
Fever > 102°F with other signs of serious infection → urgent
Active cancer + bodywork → specialty oncology massage cert required
